GRADUATION FRAMEWORK
Welcome to the GRADUATION FRAMWORK.
This module is a crucial part of making your campaigns work for you, by giving you the tools
and process to test ads and audiences in a way which minimises wasted spend and
maximises your time.
It's my signature strategy that's served me well for so many years, despite the changes
within Facebook, teaching you how to test audiences and creatives efficiently without
wasting spend.
A must-view for all level of marketers, including demos and a FAQ sheet based on questions
received from fellow students.
Level: Basic / Intermediate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
